programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike and Jersey uncover a Civil War relic that tells the story of America, and uncover the biggest piece of folk art they've ever seen.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: While visiting the Outlaw family in Texas, Mike and Jersey kick off a massive scavenger hunt for the rusty remains of a legendary Marsh Metz motorbike. Meanwhile, in Alabama, lone Wolfe Robbie pays a return visit to an old petroliana honey hole and is prepared to pay up for the holy grail of signs.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: In nostalgic North Carolina, the Wolfe brothers go hog wild for a time-travel pop-culture pick-complete with a garage full of vinyl and three collections under one roof. Down the road in Texas, the choice stockpile at Brad's Automotive features top-notch petroliana, awesome signs, and the holy grail of pinball machines.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike and Jersey meet a historian in Mississippi who maintains an extensive collection of Southern artifacts; after examining these items, the pair travels to Missouri to visit a historic property; during the site visit, they discover a rare jukebox and several other items of interest.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.desc: Mike and Jersey uncover a Civil War relic that tells the story of America, and uncover the biggest piece of folk art they've ever seen.

programme.title: Historic USA Gold
programme.desc: Secure the only .9999 fine pure gold coin with the dual date featuring 1776, the year of our nation's founding and the Liberty Bell privy. This unique 1776-2026 American Gold Buffalo comes graded perfect PF70UCAM in an exclusive 1 of 250 holder.

programme.desc: Secure the only .9999 fine pure gold coin with the dual date featuring 1776, the year of our nation's founding and the Liberty Bell privy. This unique 1776-2026 American Gold Buffalo comes graded perfect PF70UCAM in an exclusive 1 of 250 holder.

programme.title: Rare Limited Silver
programme.desc: Secure the lowest mintage Philadelphia Proof Silver Eagle ever issued by the US Mint with this 2026 Congratulations Set Silver Eagle graded PF70UCAM; this coin boasts a minuscule 60,000 mintage limit, housed in a signed First Day of Issue holder.

programme.title: Rare Limited Silver
programme.desc: Secure the lowest mintage Philadelphia Proof Silver Eagle ever issued by the US Mint with this 2026 Congratulations Set Silver Eagle graded PF70UCAM; this coin boasts a minuscule 60,000 mintage limit, housed in a signed First Day of Issue holder.

programme.title: Amazing Facts With Doug Batchelor
programme.desc: Pastor Doug Batchelor reveals facts about biblical events and brings new insight to frequently asked questions in Christianity.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: In this weekly program, Dr. David Jeremiah delivers practical messages to the congregation at the Shadow Mountain Community Church in San Diego. Also featured is music from the Shadow Mountain Community Church Choir and Orchestra, as well as performances by musical guests that have included Steve Green and Charles Billingsley. Men and women who have been impacted by the Turning Point ministry also share their stories with viewers. During the month of December, "Turning Point" usually features special Christmas programming.

programme.title: America's Book of Secrets
programme.desc: Secrets lie beneath the bullet-proof glass and armored plating of the President's convoy of vehicles.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: America's Book of Secrets
programme.desc: The complex selection process, secret rituals and special training each cadet experiences at the renowned institution of West Point.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: America's Book of Secrets
programme.desc: In 2020, COVID-19 effectively shut down the entire world, and in the process, elevated pandemics to the most important issue across the globe.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: America's Book of Secrets
programme.desc: Uncovering the darkest Sasquatch secrets; a look at The Falcon Project, a revolutionary new air ship.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: America's Book of Secrets
programme.desc: Secret training, special operations, and amazing technology used by the FBI are exposed; most notorious agents; how the Internet age has changed law enforcement.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: America's Book of Secrets
programme.desc: The secret contents, political controversy and cutting edge security behind the gates of Fort Knox.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: America's Book of Secrets
programme.desc: An inside look at the Secret Service, a top-secret law enforcement agency made up of men and women who put their lives on the line to protect current and former U.S. leaders and their families; a special agent reveals the grueling selection process.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: America's Book of Secrets
programme.desc: In 1962, Martin Luther King Jr. criticized Hoover's FBI for refusing to prosecute white supremacists who had burned down Black churches in Albany, Ga.; Hoover took King's criticisms as a personal insult, and he ordered the FBI to investigate King.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: America's Book of Secrets
programme.desc: America's wealthiest citizens and how their power and influence take root.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed With Danny Trejo
programme.desc: From ancient religious texts buried in Egypt to cultural relics found at sea, or even a tower of skulls hiding under the earth, these lost artifacts change what is known about certain sacred beliefs.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed With Danny Trejo
programme.desc: Some secrets refuse to stay buried; whether it's illicit cargo in a frozen lake, a stolen masterpiece worth millions, or a brothel hidden in the shadow of the Capitol-the truth always resurfaces.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed With Danny Trejo
programme.desc: The world's greatest fortunes often surface in the most unlikely places. From a Fabergé egg found at a humble flea market, to rare baseball cards hidden inside an old piano, or even a backyard sapphire worth a king's ransom. These treasures prove that sometimes one person's forgotten clutter can become another's once-in-a-lifetime discovery.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed With Danny Trejo
programme.desc: A long-lost keepsake tied to the world's most famous astronaut, a giant flying reptile that once ruled the skies, and a previously unknown planet orbiting two suns; some extraordinary discoveries remind us to keep looking up.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed With Danny Trejo
programme.desc: Some discoveries defy explanation, like fossilized vomit from the Jurassic era, a sewer blob with a pulse, even a long-lost toy discovered inside a man's lung. These freaky finds prove that reality can be stranger-and far creepier-than fiction.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed With Danny Trejo
programme.desc: From a $4 flea market frame concealing the Declaration of Independence, or a lost Fabergé egg in a Midwest flea market and even the holy grail of comic books hiding in someone's wall, we revisit the most astonishing, valuable discoveries.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There: Alien Edition
programme.desc: A strange sphere hovers silently above a house in Nevada. Two bright orbs appear to follow a rocket launch at Cape Canaveral. Are extraterrestrials secretly watching us? Tony Harris and his team analyze the evidence to determine whether something from beyond is monitoring humanity.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed With Danny Trejo
programme.desc: Some discoveries come with consequences; gold that ruins lives, a cursed wreck beneath the sea, and a hidden safe linked to a famous burglar, show how the past can be as dangerous as it is tempting.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.desc: From a $4 flea market frame concealing the Declaration of Independence, or a lost Fabergé egg in a Midwest flea market and even the holy grail of comic books hiding in someone's wall, we revisit the most astonishing, valuable discoveries.

programme.desc: Secure a complete 2025 Set of the iconic Morgan and Peace Silver Dollars, struck from .999 pure silver; this set contains 2 of each coin in Mint State, Proof, and Reverse Proof 70 condition with each mintage among the lowest of the modern series.

programme.desc: Secure a 1oz Gold 1776-2026 American Gold Eagle graded PF70UCAM in a special Holder, honoring 250 years of American Freedom! Included as a bonus is a free 2026 1oz Silver Eagle also featuring the iconic Liberty Bell to create a one of a kind pair!

programme.title: Amazing Facts With Doug Batchelor
programme.desc: Pastor Doug Batchelor reveals facts about biblical events and brings new insight to frequently asked questions in Christianity.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: In this weekly program, Dr. David Jeremiah delivers practical messages to the congregation at the Shadow Mountain Community Church in San Diego. Also featured is music from the Shadow Mountain Community Church Choir and Orchestra, as well as performances by musical guests that have included Steve Green and Charles Billingsley. Men and women who have been impacted by the Turning Point ministry also share their stories with viewers. During the month of December, "Turning Point" usually features special Christmas programming.

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: Many believe it to be the Word of God, but others claim it contains inconsistencies and contradictions that could only be manmade.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: More than 80% of the Earth's oceans remain unexplored, and in many ways, the underwater world is the final frontier; as new technology allows people to explore oceans and deep lakes more than ever before, nobody knows what they will find.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: Many people are afraid of walking into a cursed place or touching a reportedly cursed object; they look at whether curses are real and how they are brought into existence.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: Examining if modern technology and scientific knowledge can help protect people from almost anything, including natural disasters, or if vulnerability remains a factor.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: For centuries, humanity has been compelled to build remarkable structures that are much more than simple places of shelter or work.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: Examining what motivates someone to steal.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: More than 7 billion people live on Earth; human civilizations span the globe; although many around the globe believe that the divine hand of God placed humans on Earth, others question whether there were ever other kinds of human-like creatures.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.sub-title: The Hunt for Jack the Ripper
programme.desc: The question of the identity of Jack the Ripper has baffled police investigators, historians, and armchair detectives for over a century, even with media offering its own unique take on the killer's identity.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: Throughout history, catastrophic disasters have reshaped civilizations -- yet some events defy all scientific expectations.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd
programme.desc: These are the stories of history's most unusual pastimes, some fascinating, some dangerous, but each of them completely unbelievable.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd
programme.desc: Exploring the Lake Michigan Triangle and many other wild and weird places, including a doll-filled island with a dark past, deadly gas-filled explosive lakes, caves that harbor deadly viruses and a haunted place in the United States.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd
programme.desc: History is full of legendary missions, but some are so bizarre, they sound like fiction; from a covert op involving toilet paper, to a war sparked by a single tree, to a pilot who turned the skies into a candy drop zone.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd
programme.desc: In Boston, a 25-foot tidal wave of molasses; a dancing plague that kills 100 people; a surgery with a 300% mortality rate; searching the globe for the strangest and most bizarre deaths on record.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd
programme.desc: Some of Earth's most remarkable creatures push the limits of belief - from a headless chicken who toured the nation, to a goat who tipped the scales of war, to dolphins drafted into Cold War espionage. Proof that the strangest legends sometimes walk, swim, or fly among us.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd
programme.desc: From a doctor who swallowed Yellow Fever vomit to prove a theory, to another who stitched together a two-headed dog, history's boldest experiments reveal just how far some minds will go; buckle in for a flying lawn chair ride, hear sound played through a dead man's ear, and witness a billionaire's bloody hunt for immortality; these are the maddest minds-and their most unbelievable experiments.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There
programme.sub-title: Classic British UFO, Cheshire Cat Water Monsters, and Alabama Bigfoot Growl
programme.desc: Did a passenger film a UFO from a plane in the 1960s?; fishermen see a frightening smile in the depths of a river, what grinning Amazonian monster did they encounter?; is a legendary beast stalking the backwoods of Alabama?; a dead English aristocrat appears in a mysterious photo, Sir Arthur Conan Doyle believed it proves ghosts are real, should you?; Tony Harris and his team of experts analyze the video evidence to find the truth.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd
programme.desc: From calling Veteran's Stadium home, to setting up camp in an airport terminal, to turning an unassuming dumpster into a luxurious abode, each of these dwellings are so beyond odd, that they are truly unbelievable.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
